title: Adobe Project Indigo Introduces AI Photo Assistant to Enhance Shooting and Editing Experience with Large Models
excerpt: Adobe is adding a series of AI features to its experimental iOS camera app, Project Indigo, which uses large language models (LLMs) to analyze photo content and
content_html:
Adobe is adding a series of AI features to its experimental iOS camera app, Project Indigo, which uses large language models (LLMs) to analyze photo content and provide users with photography critiques, editing suggestions, and intelligent optimization solutions. The app previously supported professional shooting controls, multi-frame super-resolution, and various photography modes, and this update further enhances AI-assisted creative capabilities.

New features include photo critiques, shooting and editing suggestions, advanced object removal, AI-generated depth of field, and photo style transfer. The photo critique feature provides analysis similar to that of a professional photographer, covering aspects such as composition, lighting, color, and emotional expression; the shooting suggestion feature offers specific guidance on re-composing, exposure adjustments, and optimizing visual elements to help users improve their photography skills.

Marc Levoy, the lead developer of Project Indigo, previously participated in the development of Google Pixel camera technology. He stated that most current generative AI image tools rely on user input prompts, but ordinary users often find it difficult to accurately describe the desired adjustment effects. Therefore, Project Indigo focuses more on button-based and deterministic operations, allowing AI to directly provide executable editing solutions.

In terms of smart editing, Project Indigo's new object removal feature can automatically identify and remove distracting elements in the background, such as people, trash cans, utility poles, and vehicles, while also supporting user-defined descriptions for objects to be removed. Compared to traditional methods requiring manual selection, this feature reduces the operational cost and improves the processing results.

Additionally, the app supports generating depth-of-field effects using AI to simulate background blur for regular photos, and offers style transfer effects such as watercolor, pen drawing, colored ink lines, monochrome, and backlighting. However, style transfer is not a new technology, and its practical application value still needs further verification.

Currently, the new AI capabilities of Project Indigo are supported by the Nano Banana model based on Google Gemini. Adobe also mentioned that it may test other AI models, including its self-developed Adobe Firefly model, in the future. These features are currently available in the "AI Playground" testing area and are only open to a select group of users, and whether they will be fully promoted remains uncertain.

sentences.zh: 在智能编辑方面，Project Indigo新增的物体移除功能可以自动识别并移除背景中的干扰元素，如人物、垃圾桶、电线杆、车辆等，同时还支持用户自定义移除物体的描述。

sentences.zh: 此外，该应用还支持使用AI生成景深效果，模拟普通照片的背景模糊，并提供水彩、钢笔画、彩色墨线、单色和逆光等风格转移效果。

sentences.en: However, style transfer is not a new technology, and its practical application value still needs further verification.
sentences.zh: 不过，风格迁移并不是一项新技术，其实际应用价值仍需进一步验证。

sentences.en: Currently, the new AI capabilities of Project Indigo are supported by the Nano Banana model based on Google Gemini.
sentences.zh: 目前，Project Indigo的新AI能力由基于Google Gemini的Nano Banana模型支持。

sentences.en: Adobe also mentioned that it may test other AI models, including its self-developed Adobe Firefly model, in the future.
sentences.zh: Adobe还提到，未来可能会测试其他AI模型，包括其自研的Adobe Firefly模型。

sentences.en: These features are currently available in the "AI Playground" testing area and are only open to a select group of users, and whether they will be fully promoted remains uncertain.
sentences.zh: 这些功能目前已在“AI Playground”测试区开放，仅向选定的一组用户开放，是否全面推广仍不确定。

content_html_zh:
Adobe 正在其实验性 iOS 相机应用程序 Project Indigo 中添加一系列 AI 功能，该应用程序使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 来分析照片内容，并为用户提供摄影评论、编辑建议和智能优化解决方案。 该应用此前支持专业拍摄控制、多帧超分辨率以及多种摄影模式，本次更新进一步增强了AI辅助创作能力。

新功能包括照片评论、拍摄和编辑建议、高级对象删除、人工智能生成的景深以及照片风格转换。 照片评论功能提供类似专业摄影师的分析，涵盖构图、光线、色彩、情感表达等方面；拍摄建议功能提供重新构图、调整曝光、优化视觉元素等具体指导，帮助用户提高摄影技巧。

Project Indigo 的首席开发人员 Marc Levoy 此前参与了 Google Pixel 相机技术的开发。 他表示，目前的生成式AI图像工具大多依赖于用户输入提示，但普通用户往往很难准确地描述出想要的调整效果。 因此，Project Indigo更注重基于按钮的、确定性的操作，让AI直接提供可执行的编辑解决方案。

在智能编辑方面，Project Indigo新增的物体移除功能可以自动识别并移除背景中的干扰元素，如人物、垃圾桶、电线杆、车辆等，同时还支持用户自定义移除物体的描述。 与需要手动选择的传统方法相比，该功能降低了运营成本并提高了处理效果。

此外，该应用还支持使用AI生成景深效果，模拟普通照片的背景模糊，并提供水彩、钢笔画、彩色墨线、单色和逆光等风格转移效果。 不过，风格迁移并不是一项新技术，其实际应用价值仍需进一步验证。

目前，Project Indigo的新AI能力由基于Google Gemini的Nano Banana模型支持。 Adobe还提到，未来可能会测试其他AI模型，包括其自研的Adobe Firefly模型。 这些功能目前已在“AI Playground”测试区开放，仅向选定的一组用户开放，是否全面推广仍不确定。
